texto: When you were growing up, your mom and dad told you to look both ways before crossing the street or not to get into a car with a stranger. It's the same with the Internet. We have a big responsibility and a huge role in bringing all the stakeholders to the table - users, parents, educators, law enforcement, government organisations.
explicacao: Citação de Chris DeWolfe sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “When you were growing up, your mom and dad told you to look both ways before crossing the street …” articula educacao, car, responsibility em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como responsibility e parents.
